task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the wger fitness manager as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger dashboard or homepage is visible, and the top navigation or user profile area indicates the user is logged in (e.g., 'admin' is visible).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Power Training' workout routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the details page for the 'Power Training' workout routine.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the interface to add a new training day.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page titled 'Add training day' (or similar) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct name for the new training day.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Chest and Triceps' is typed into the description or name input field of the training day form.

task_completion.description: Verify the new training day was successfully saved and added to the routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Power Training' routine page now explicitly lists 'Chest and Triceps' as one of its training days.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the application via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface (like Chromium or Firefox) being used, rather than terminal commands (e.g., curl) or database manipulation scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual wger web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'localhost' or '127.0.0.1' and the genuine wger UI is visible, not a text editor or a static HTML mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open to manipulate the DOM text directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target workout routine is named 'Power Training'. The agent must add a new training day to this specific routine, and the new day must be named exactly 'Chest and Triceps'.
